canonical_definition: A benchmark introduced by Alibaba Group comprising concise, fact-oriented questions to assess the factual capabilities of LLMs in a Chinese context, focusing on general knowledge.
papers: Controlled Low-Rank Adaptation with Subspace Regularization for Continued Training on Large Language Models
